comments.replyBody: Fixed. Wrapped `git diff` in `{ git diff ... || true; }` before piping to `head -500` to prevent SIGPIPE under `set -o pipefail`. When the diff exceeds 500 lines, `head` closes the pipe early, causing `git diff` to exit 141. Without the wrapper, `pipefail` propagates 141 and `|| echo "(no diff)"` fires, silently discarding the diff. The `|| true` absorbs the SIGPIPE exit so `head` sees only the first 500 lines as intended.

Fixed. Moved result file validation (`validate_result_file`) to run before the tee/agent exit checks. Now if the agent wrote a valid result file, the function returns 0 immediately — even if `tee` failed due to filesystem issues on `$ISSUES_DIR`. The result file lives in `$WORKTREE_DIR` (the agent's cwd), so a valid result from there should take priority over a log-write failure.
